title: Add retry utility with exponential backoff
description: Create retry<T>(fn: () => Promise<T>, maxAttempts: number, delayMs: number): Promise<T> in src/utils/async-helpers.ts with exponential backoff and co-located tests. The function should retry failed async operations with configurable max attempts and delay between retries.
existing_patterns: src/utils/retry.ts - existing retry utility with exponential backoff using options object pattern (maxRetries, initialDelay, backoffFactor)
src/utils/retry.test.ts - comprehensive tests using vitest fake timers
src/utils/debounce.ts - async utility pattern in src/utils/
